name: funeral_case_notification
description: Notifies begravningsansvarig via Telegram when a new funeral case is registered. Also notifies if a case includes repatriation (requires faster action). No PII beyond deceased name.

steps.notes: Receives POST with case_id, deceased_name, package, repatriation, destination
Branch: if repatriation=true, use urgent template
Send to begravningsansvarig chat. If repatriation: also send to admin group.
